Package raytracer

package raytracer
  • Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    CheckeredMaterial
    Represents a material with a checkered appearance that extends the base material.
    Color
    Represents a color with r, g, and b values.
    Light
    Represents a very basic version of light in 3D space.
    Material
    Represents a basic material with diffuse and specular properties.
    Ray
    Represents a ray in 3D-space.
    Raytracer
    The main class for setting up the scene and controlling the raytracing.
    RefractiveMaterial
    Represents a refractive material that extends the base material.
    Sphere
    Represents a Sphere that can be placed in the 3D scene with the given size and material properties.
    Vector3d
    Represents a three-dimensional vector.
